title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Microtek International South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Microtek International South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Microtek International South Asia Partners has an exciting opening for a Process Engineer at our Lucknow office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Microtek International South Asia Partners:
Microtek International South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in GD&T

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Microtek International South Asia Partners!
